$schema: NPC dialogue table for the walk scene (Task 19). Slots: greeter, guide-wait, guide-arrive ({landmark} token). landmarks steer the guide NPC.
greeter: Welcome to the three.ws office — make yourself at home.
Hey, good to have you in. Desks are open, wander freely.
Welcome aboard. The plants are real, the coffee's hot.
Glad you stopped by. Take a lap, see the whole floor.
guide-wait: Take your time — I'll wait by the desks.
No rush, the floor's quiet today.
I'll hold here until you're ready to move on.
guide-arrive: We've reached {landmark}. Have a look around.
